name: Peloton Interactive, Inc.
description: Peloton Interactive, Inc. is an American exercise equipment and media company based in New York City. The company provides an at-home fitness platform featuring connected fitness products, including stationary bicycles, treadmills, and indoor rowers. These products are equipped with Internet-connected touch screens that stream live and on-demand fitness classes through a subscription service. Founded in 2012, Peloton has established a global community of members across the United States, United Kingdom, Canada, Germany, and Australia, offering a comprehensive wellness experience that combines high-quality hardware with immersive digital content.
